inputs.name: collapseLabel
inputs.description: ARIA label for button when the header is expanded

inputs.name: collapsible
inputs.description:
whether the header can be collapsed. True by default. If set to false, both pin/collapse buttons disappear
and the header stays visible

inputs.name: expandLabel
inputs.description: ARIA label for button when the header is collapsed

inputs.name: pinAriaLabel
inputs.description: aria label for pin state of pin button

inputs.name: pinnable
inputs.description:
whether the header should be allowed to be pinned or unpinned. When set, the pin button shows up.
Pinning the header will make the header stay visible and the collapse button(if present) will disappear until unpinned.

inputs.name: unpinAriaLabel
inputs.description: aria label for unpin state of pin button

methods.name: toggleCollapse
methods.description:
toggles the state of the header and
handles expanded/collapsed event
